name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Three fixes: (1) the AI no longer drops to a weaker model on temporary rate-limit bursts - it verifies real quota exhaustion first, and the proxy now rotates all its keys on per-minute limits too; (2) the progress dialog no longer vanishes mid-translation on long movies (idle-based timeout instead of a hard 2-minute cap); (3) a remembered low-match English source no longer starves a much better one - the best source wins when it's >10% better.
